PromptRouterArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the default prompt router.
PromptRouterArn.markdownDescription:
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the default prompt router.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 2048  
Pattern: ^arn:aws(-[^:]+)?:bedrock:[a-z0-9-]{1,20}:[0-9]{12}:default-prompt-router/[a-zA-Z0-9-:.]+$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

PromptRouterId.description: The unique identifier of the default prompt router, extracted from the ARN.

ModelArn.markdownDescription:
The target model's ARN.

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 2048

Update requires: No interruption
